message:
🐛 Fix mission polling to use agent-first and rocket launch animation (#343)

Mission status polling was REST-only, so when the backend is down
missions stayed stuck at "Launching" with 0/0 Pending. Now polls
the local agent first (http://127.0.0.1:8585/deployments) and falls
back to REST API.

Also replace the spinning Rocket icon with a proper blast-off animation
(translate-up + scale pulses) so it looks like a launching rocket
instead of a rotating loader.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
